Title: Campori, Giuseppe B., Marchese
Overview: Italian documentary historian, architectural historian and art biographer. In the 1850's he assisted G. B. Cavalcaselle in his abortive attempts to issue a documentary version of Vasari's Vite.
Selected Bibliography: Gli artisti italiani e stranieri negli stati Estensi: catalogo storico corredato di documenti inediti. Modena: R.D. Camera, 1855; Lettere artistiche inedite. Modena: Tipografia dell'Erede Soliani, 1866.
